fields.purpose: Define the structure for a project context workspace.
current: Navigation, node details, and export actions are in scope.
Marketing pages are out of scope for this document.
fields.ai_task: Suggest interaction improvements without changing public naming.
fields.ai_boundary: Do not rename protocol, CLI, npm scope, or package names.
risk: Users may confuse document structure with a task tracker.
verify: Export to HTML and inspect heading hierarchy.
history: 2026-06-05 created as official app design example.

fields.purpose: Capture expanded, collapsed, focused, and search states.
verify: Focused node can be copied as text.
